original_snippet_context: Discussing the reporting on a meeting in Petrópolis regarding the Convênio de Taubaté and its relation to monetary policy.
relevant_quote: o presidente “julga não ter competência para approvar o convênio e acha incompatível com os compromissos do Brasil em relação aos seus credores internos e externos a quebra do nosso padrão monetário“
justification: The quote expresses concern about maintaining Brazil's monetary standard ('padrão monetário') and commitments to creditors, aligning with the orthodox view of prioritizing a stable currency and opposing measures seen as potentially harmful to creditors.
